_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
notes: Cycle 7: +3 minigames (fouille: find hidden object among 15 decoys with 2s shuffle, 12s timer, early find bonus; ombres: stealth corridor navigation with narrowing winding path, 10s timer, collision penalty; volonte: hold cursor on pulsing center circle vs flashing distractor squares, 10s timer, focus %). +20 FastRoute cards for marais_korrigans+ankou (bog/death themes: will-o-wisps, drowned crossroads, ghostly washerwomen, bog bodies, ankou's cart, death omens, spectral processions, ancestor bargains, mortal coil choices, singing reeds, spectral door). 12/14 minigames done. 126 card templates total (106+20). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5). App bundle 242KB (+34KB from 20 card templates), under 280KB WARN threshold.
